title: castilleja lebgueana
intro: Castilleja lebgueana, also known as Indian paintbrush, is a flowering plant species in the family Orobanchaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and acting as an antioxidant. Castilleja lebgueana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to support immune function and soothe skin conditions.
